title: Cornelius ED-150 No Carbonation
summary: Guided diagnosis for no carbonation on a fountain system.

steps.title: CO2 Supply Check
steps.text: Is the CO2 tank open and not empty?
steps.noAction: Open the CO2 tank valve or replace the empty CO2 tank, then retest carbonation.

steps.title: Regulator Pressure Check
steps.text: Is the CO2 regulator set near the correct operating pressure?
steps.noAction: Adjust the regulator to the correct target pressure for the system, then retest.

steps.title: Carbonator Pump Check
steps.text: Does the carbonator pump run when carbonated water is dispensed?
steps.noAction: Check pump power, water supply, motor operation, and control signal from the dispenser.

steps.title: Final Checks
steps.text: If CO2 supply, regulator pressure, and pump operation are good, check for water supply restrictions, failed check valves, air in the system, or a weak carbonator pump.

title: Water in CO2 Line
summary: Possible check valve failure or backflow issue in the carbonation system.

steps.title: Confirm Backflow
steps.text: Is water visible inside the CO2 line?
steps.noAction: If no water is visible, inspect for intermittent backflow, low CO2 pressure, or other carbonation issues.

steps.title: Replace Check Valve
steps.text: Shut off CO2, depressurize safely, replace the failed check valve, purge the affected CO2 line, and retest the system.
